blended.narrative: Sasquatch Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
